correct: theorem add_comm : ∀ a b : ℕ, a + b = b + a := by intros; ring
wrong_similar: theorem add_comm : ∀ a b : ℕ, a + b = b - a := by intros; ring

correct: theorem t : 1 + 1 = 2 := rfl
wrong_similar: theorem t : 1 + 1 = 3 := rfl

correct: theorem mul_zero : ∀ n : ℕ, n * 0 = 0 := by intros; simp
wrong_similar: theorem mul_zero : ∀ n : ℕ, n * 0 = n := by intros; simp

correct: theorem zero_add : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 + n = n := by intros; simp
wrong_similar: theorem zero_add : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 + n = 1 := by intros; simp

correct: theorem refl_eq : ∀ (x : α), x = x := fun _ => rfl
wrong_similar: theorem refl_eq : ∀ (x : α), x = 0 := fun _ => rfl

correct: theorem and_comm : p ∧ q → q ∧ p := fun ⟨a,b⟩ => ⟨b,a⟩
wrong_similar: theorem and_comm : p ∧ q → p ∧ p := fun ⟨a,b⟩ => ⟨a,a⟩

correct: theorem or_comm : p ∨ q → q ∨ p := by intro h; cases h <;> simp [*]
wrong_similar: theorem or_comm : p ∨ q → p ∧ q := by intro h; cases h <;> simp [*]

correct: theorem id_fn : ∀ x, id x = x := fun _ => rfl
wrong_similar: theorem id_fn : ∀ x, id x = 0 := fun _ => rfl

correct: theorem succ_ne_zero : ∀ n : ℕ, n.succ ≠ 0 := fun n => Nat.succ_ne_zero n
wrong_similar: theorem succ_ne_zero : ∀ n : ℕ, n.succ = 0 := fun n => Nat.succ_ne_zero n

correct: theorem add_assoc : ∀ a b c : ℕ, (a+b)+c = a+(b+c) := by intros; ring
wrong_similar: theorem add_assoc : ∀ a b c : ℕ, (a+b)+c = a+(b-c) := by intros; ring

correct: theorem not_not : ¬¬p ↔ p := by tauto
wrong_similar: theorem not_not : ¬¬p ↔ ¬p := by tauto

correct: theorem imp_self : p → p := fun h => h
wrong_similar: theorem imp_self : p → q := fun h => h

correct: theorem eq_symm : a = b → b = a := fun h => h.symm
wrong_similar: theorem eq_symm : a = b → a = b := fun h => h.symm

correct: theorem le_refl : ∀ n : ℕ, n ≤ n := fun n => Nat.le_refl n
wrong_similar: theorem le_refl : ∀ n : ℕ, n < n := fun n => Nat.le_refl n

correct: theorem lt_irrefl : ∀ n : ℕ, ¬ (n < n) := fun n h => Nat.lt_irrefl n h
wrong_similar: theorem lt_irrefl : ∀ n : ℕ, (n < n) := fun n h => Nat.lt_irrefl n h

correct: theorem pair_eq : (a,b) = (a,b) := rfl
wrong_similar: theorem pair_eq : (a,b) = (b,a) := rfl

correct: theorem true_intro : True := trivial
wrong_similar: theorem true_intro : False := trivial

correct: theorem false_elim : False → p := fun h => h.elim
wrong_similar: theorem false_elim : True → p := fun h => h.elim

correct: theorem two_add_two : 2 + 2 = 4 := rfl
wrong_similar: theorem two_add_two : 2 + 2 = 5 := rfl

correct: theorem three_times_three : 3 * 3 = 9 := rfl
wrong_similar: theorem three_times_three : 3 * 3 = 6 := rfl
